scope: Developer-side audit notes. This data is not part of DOMAIN_ADMIN runtime config and is not imported by the admin.

specificationIssues.title: Food quantity unit unclear
specificationIssues.handling: Kept as explicit ration points; weight remains quantity x 0.2 lbs until units are canonized.

specificationIssues.title: Race target needs not cleanly linked
specificationIssues.handling: Exposed target protein/energy/weight as editable inputs instead of hiding a weak race lookup.
